task_completion.description: Generate a 360-degree polar for the NACA 4412 airfoil at Re=1,000,000
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade XFoil/Polar analysis module showing NACA 4412 selected, Reynolds number set to 1,000,000, and a 360-degree extrapolated polar graph or table visible.

task_completion.description: Design a 3-bladed HAWT rotor with a 10.5m radius
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade Rotor Blade Design module showing a 3-bladed configuration and the blade table/geometry ending at a radius (pos) of exactly 10.5m.

task_completion.description: Set up and run a BEM simulation at 10 m/s wind speed
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade Rotor BEM Simulation module showing the wind speed parameter set to 10 m/s in the simulation definition.

task_completion.description: Determine the pitch angle to limit mechanical power to 50 kW (±2 kW)
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade simulation results (graph or table) showing the mechanical power output is between 48 kW and 52 kW at 10 m/s wind speed, with a non-zero pitch angle applied to de-rate the power.

task_completion.description: Save the project and export simulation results to the specified paths
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal window, or text editor showing 'derating_study.wpa' and 'target_power_result.txt' successfully created in '/home/ga/Documents/projects/'.

task_completion.description: Record the final pitch angle in pitch_setting.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., using 'cat') showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/projects/pitch_setting.txt' containing the numerical pitch angle used to achieve the 50 kW target.

integrity.description: The agent used the QBlade GUI to perform the design and simulation tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QBlade graphical user interface open and being actively interacted with (e.g., rotor design, polar generation, simulation setup).

integrity.description: The exported results come from a genuine BEM simulation rather than being manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'target_power_result.txt' file or QBlade result tables should contain comprehensive simulation data columns (e.g., CP, CT, Power, Thrust, Pitch) typical of QBlade exports, not just a single typed line saying '50 kW'.

integrity.description: The pitch angle recorded in the text file matches the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical value written in 'pitch_setting.txt' must match the pitch angle shown in the QBlade BEM simulation interface that yielded the ~50 kW power output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires using QBlade for a HAWT de-rating analysis. Target power: 50 kW (50,000 W) with a ±2 kW tolerance. Wind speed: 10 m/s. Rotor radius: 10.5m (21m diameter). Airfoil: NACA 4412. Reynolds number: 1,000,000. Simulation method: BEM. Blade count: 3. The natural power output of this turbine at 10 m/s is typically 75-85 kW (Cp ≈ 0.35-0.40). To de-rate to 50 kW, the agent must use pitch control (feathering the blades) to reduce the power coefficient (Cp) to approximately 0.24. Expected file paths: /home/ga/Documents/projects/derating_study.wpa, /home/ga/Documents/projects/target_power_result.txt, and /home/ga/Documents/projects/pitch_setting.txt.
